gates.title: Deep Sleep operational artifacts are bounded without deleting unfinished work
evidence_required: src/deep_sleep_retention.py keeps the newest DB backup families and analyzed contexts while preserving unfinished contexts
src/scripts/nexo-deep-sleep.sh runs retention at startup and successful exits
tests/test_deep_sleep_retention.py covers DB backup retention, analyzed-context pruning, unfinished-context preservation, log rotation, and legacy layout

gates.title: Existing installs apply Deep Sleep retention during update
evidence_required: src/auto_update.py runs prune_deep_sleep_runtime during the Deep Sleep heal path
src/scripts/nexo-sleep.py runs the same retention policy during daily housekeeping
tests/test_auto_update_heal_deep_sleep.py verifies update-time cleanup for existing installs

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.7
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page, and sitemap reference v7.30.7
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill, and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.7
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.7 contract before tag publish
